description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the global image aurorafossorg/archlinux:latest and defining the stages check, build, test, production, and deploy. Add an examples job in the test stage that runs the x86_64 before_script (pacman installing libsndfile, libx11, libxcursor, libxxf86vm and yay installing libsoundio), uses the aurorafossorg/dlang:latest image, executes ./tools/do-examples.sh, caches the .dub/ directory, and stores examples/.out/bin/ as an artifact named $CI_JOB_NAME. Add a unittests job in the test stage that runs the same x86_64 before_script, then runs "dub add-local ." and "./tools/dub.sh $BUILD_DUB_FLAGS" with BUILD_DUB_FLAGS set to "$CI_JOB_STAGE --build=unittest-cov --coverage -- -v", caches .dub/, produces .out/bin/ artifacts, and uploads coverage via a Codecov after_script. Define the jobs x86-linux-dub-dmd-debug, x86-linux-dub-dmd-release, x86-linux-dub-gdc-debug, x86-linux-dub-ldc-debug, x86-linux-dub-ldc-release, x86_64-linux-dub-dmd-debug, x86_64-linux-dub-dmd-release, x86_64-linux-dub-gdc-debug, x86_64-linux-dub-ldc-debug, and x86_64-linux-dub-ldc-release, each using the appropriate x86 or x86_64 before_script, the aurorafossorg/dlang:latest image, the shared script sequence "dub add-local ." then "./tools/dub.sh $BUILD_DUB_FLAGS" with BUILD_DUB_FLAGS reflecting the architecture, compiler, and debug or release mode, caching .dub/ and publishing .out/bin/ as artifacts; the debug variants run in the build stage while the release variants run in the production stage, and the gdc debug jobs allow failure.
